text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A fan letter has arrived for Matikanefukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Omigosh! A fan letter? For me?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Are you sure I can have this? I mean, I'm no
lucky charm myself. Should someone like me
really take this honor?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hehe, then I guess I'll take it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Fan letters are mystical relics that can endow one
with the most miraculous of boons! I must give
praise right away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon saying this, she retreats into the corner of
my office to pray over the letter.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I give thanks! Please continue to watch over this
pitiful self of mine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the scene at hand, it looks like the fan
support has boosted her spirits.
